name: Darlow Dairy Farm - XXL Woofia
description: Darlow Dairy Farm is the home of the bovinefolk and taurusians, where the cream of the crop bulls milk themselves dry to provide premium bull milk to the world of Woofia. After a certain incident with some devious sex toys, the leader Dallawan is looking to bring in reliable trustworthy people to serve as stand-in "helping hands" to aid in milking his fellow bulls and minotaurs.
creator: Caribeau
